raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within the reach envelope of the right arm, no objects are immediately touching its left or right sides, and the claw aperture can encompass the 5 cm diameter of the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right claw gripper and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop, clearing the area in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area (front-right corner, free space)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the chosen front-right corner of the table is free of obstacles and provides a stable, flat surface.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released on the designated front-right corner of the table, well away from the boxes, and the right arm is free."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2 (front face)",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_2 is now unobstructed (cup removed). There is at least 10 cm of clear space in front of the box to allow a controlled forward push without it colliding with the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated approximately 15 cm toward the front edge of the table, creating a gap between the right side of box_1 and the left side of box_2 so that both lateral sides of box_1 are accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both the left and right sides of box_1 are unobstructed after moving box_2. The robot’s torso is positioned so that both arms can reach the mid-height of the box, and sufficient clearance exists above the box for a lift.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely clamped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table surface, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within the reach envelope of the right arm, no objects are immediately touching its left or right sides, and the claw aperture can encompass the 5 cm diameter of the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right claw gripper and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop, clearing the area in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the chosen front-right corner of the table is free of obstacles and provides a stable, flat surface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released on the designated front-right corner of the table, well away from the boxes, and the right arm is free.

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_2 is now unobstructed (cup removed). There is at least 10 cm of clear space in front of the box to allow a controlled forward push without it colliding with the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated approximately 15 cm toward the front edge of the table, creating a gap between the right side of box_1 and the left side of box_2 so that both lateral sides of box_1 are accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both the left and right sides of box_1 are unobstructed after moving box_2. The robot’s torso is positioned so that both arms can reach the mid-height of the box, and sufficient clearance exists above the box for a lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely clamped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table surface, completing the pick-up task.
